name: Maple Nut Rugelach
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the first six ingredients in a bowl until smooth.
2. Gradually beat in flour to blend. Shape into a ball, wrap in wax paper, and chill for 2 hours until firm.
3. Prepare the filling by stirring together the first four ingredients of the filling section.
4. Divide the dough in half. Roll each half on a floured surface to about 1/8 inch thick.
5. Cut dough into a 10-inch circle.
6. Spread the circle with the filling.
7. Cut the circle into 16 pie-shaped wedges.
8. Roll up each wedge, starting with the wide edge, in jelly roll fashion.
9. Place the point side down on a baking sheet.
10. Repeat the procedure with the remaining dough.
11. Beat the egg and water together and brush over the cookies.
12. Sprinkle with sugar.
13. Bake at 350°F for 15-20 minutes or until lightly browned.
14. Remove from oven to cooling racks.
15. Store airtight for up to 2 days. Almonds or pecans may be substituted for walnuts.
